steps.title: Identify the defining difference in the notes
steps.content:
The notes reveal that Touchardia latifolia is native (catalogued among fifteen native species), while Hedychium gardnerianum is non-native (among twenty-nine non-native species).

To effectively contrast these two plants, a response must highlight this native versus non-native distinction.

steps.title: Evaluate how each choice establishes the contrast
steps.content:
The correct answer employs the contrast word “but” to directly show the difference established in the notes: Touchardia is native, Hedychium is not.

This makes the distinction explicit and effective for contrasting the two plants.

The other choices either treat both plants similarly or mention only one without establishing a comparison.

C is correct.
